mano_cua.result_summary: Bug 确认复现：AccordionHeader 内部 button 元素上 aria-controls 属性完全缺失。通过 DevTools Elements + Accessibility 面板验证：h2 元素无 ARIA 属性（正确），但 button 元素只有 aria-expanded 没有 aria-controls（错误）。屏幕阅读器无法理解按钮与折叠内容的关联关系，违反 WAI-ARIA 规范。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Inspected AccordionHeader DOM: h2.accordion-header > button.accordion-button. Button has aria-expanded=true but NO aria-controls attribute. The attribute is missing entirely from both h2 and button elements. This breaks WAI-ARIA accordion pattern accessibility.
